name: Sand Loop
core_loop: Tap to release buckets onto a conveyor belt to collect matching colored sand and complete pixel art images.
audience_proxy: Casual mobile players, likely 25-45, who enjoy satisfying ASMR-style sorting puzzles and creative reveals.
visual_style: 3D stylized objects with vibrant colors and pixel-art sand compositions.

palette.description: A bright, clean palette dominated by sky blue and white, with high-saturation primary colors for the sand and interactive elements.
